Project Support to Emeritus Prof. Erdal Panayırcı within the Scope of the TUBITAK-US National Science Foundation (NSF) Bilateral Cooperation Program

The project titled

“Nonlinear and Non-separable Radar and Data (NIRAD) Communications for Pareto Efficient Spectrum Access in Next Generation Wireless Networks”, l

ed by our faculty member Emeritus

from the Department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering and carried out in collaboration with

Prof. Vincent H. Poor

from Princeton University, has been awarded support within the scope of the TUBITAK-US National Science Foundation (NSF) Bilateral Cooperation Program.

We congratulate Prof. Panayırcı and wish her continued success.
